title: silybum maculatum
intro: Silybum marianum, commonly known as Milk thistle, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant's seeds contain silymarin, a flavonoid complex with potent medicinal properties, which has been used to protect the liver from damage and promote its regeneration. The health benefits of Silybum marianum include treating liver and gallbladder disorders, improving liver function, and reducing inflammation. Silybum marianum is commonly prepared as a capsule, tablet, or extract, and is often used in herbal supplements to support liver health and detoxification.
